name: forgemap3d
description: A printable 3D map editor for the Netherlands using OpenStreetMap and 3DBAG.

scripts.test: node scripts/check-line-prism-boundary.mjs && node scripts/check-building-boundary.mjs && node scripts/check-water-visibility.mjs && node scripts/check-osm-water-topology.mjs && node scripts/check-land-cover-stability.mjs && node scripts/check-netherlands-scope.mjs && node scripts/check-export-orientation.mjs && node scripts/check-export-loading-yield.mjs
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
